content.en:
"It turned out to be here in the Black Trick Sea!"

The Lord of Mount Xun recognized it.

There weren't many resources here, so very few of the Bone Transformation Realms came here.

The point is that the Black Treacherous Domain Sea is very large, and there are also some dangers for ordinary bone transformation realms.

Therefore, if this is the place where the Haven Inheritance on the other side was born, it will indeed not be easy to find in a short period of time.

Soon.

Ye Tian took the Lord of Xunshan to the black giant mountain.

And the Lord of Xunshan himself entered a hole in this black giant mountain, and it didn't take long for him to come out.

He didn't lack a few other havens, so there was no need to take the test here.

"It is indeed the land of the inheritance of the Haven on the other side, and you have made a great contribution to the Endless Lord. I don't know if this place has been discovered by other bone transformation realms, but the best way to do it right now is to ask a deputy mountain master to take action and move this place back!"

The main road of Mount Xun.

"Hmm!"

Ye Tian nodded.

Subsequently.

The Lord of Mount Xun contacted a deputy mountain lord.

Time passed little by little, and it was not long before an unimaginably terrifying giant hand came across the land of eternity.

"This breath ......"

Ye Tian recognized it.

The deputy mountain lord who made this shot was the master of eternal zero.

"Get out of the way!"

The Lord of Xunshan pulled Ye Tian and quickly retreated.

Immediately afterward, the monstrous giant hand of the Lord of Eternal Zero directly dug out the time and space around this land of Haven inheritance on the other side bit by bit.

Rumble!!!!!!

Dense black lines emerged, resisting this monstrous giant hand.

Any treasure land is connected to the surrounding void, for example, this black giant mountain is connected to this sea area, and if you want to dig it up, you must fight against the power of this sea area.

And Ye Tian can't do it, and the Lord of Xunshan can't do it either.

However, the Lord of Eternal Zero can do it.

Click!!!

This land of the Haven Inheritance on the other side was quickly stripped away from here, captured by the Lord of Eternal Zero, and brought back to Guheng Mountain.

"Let's go back too!"

The main road of Mount Xun.

"Hmm!"

Ye Tian followed the Lord of Xunshan back.

And after he came back, he found that there was an additional treasure mountain in Guheng Mountain, which was the place of inheritance of Haven on the other side.

Next.

Gu Heng Mountain asked many envoys and patrol envoys to enter this place of the inheritance of the black text on the other side to participate in the assessment.

And Ye Tian was waiting for the reward of Gu Heng Mountain to arrive.

After a while.

The Lord of Xunshan asked Ye Tian to meet him.

Soon, he met the Lord of Xunshan.

Then.

The Lord of Xunshan got straight to the point and said, "Lord of Endless, according to the research and decision of the high-level officials of Gu Heng Mountain, this time I will give you the position of a sixth-level envoy, and give you 30 million contribution points!"

"Thank you, Lord of Xunshan!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

The sixth-level envoy is not enough, but the contribution value of 30 million is really a lot, and it is an unimaginable contribution value for many envoys.

With 30 million contribution points, he can exchange a lot of resources, and he can also comprehend all the golden texts on the other side of the ancient Heng Mountain.

In the following years, he did his best to comprehend the golden inscriptions on the other side of the ancient Heng Mountain.

Of course.

He was also exchanging resources that would help him refine the immeasurable bones, striving to refine the immeasurable bones one by one to six bone transformations.

However, going from the fifth bone transformation realm to the sixth bone transformation realm is really difficult and difficult, and there are too many resources spent.

Before you know it, hundreds of primeval eras have passed.

At this time, Ye Tian had mastered a lot of golden texts on the other side, and together he probably had more than three hundred golden texts on the other side.

And the gold inscriptions on the other side of Gu Heng Mountain are five hundred.

After mastering more than 300 golden texts on the other side, he was ready to turn his entire palm into the golden body of the other side, and this required him to create such a method of the golden body of the other side again.

To this end, he began to study again.

This time, it took him more than a dozen primeval years to successfully create a secret method that turned the entire palm of his hand into a golden body.

Of course, this is not a secret method, but a combination of seven secret methods, and after being superimposed, the entire palm can be transformed into a golden body.

Rumble!!!!!

All kinds of materials were absorbed and refined by Ye Tian's palm, and combined with the golden inscription on the other side of the door, they formed a pattern on the other side, which was integrated into the palm of his hand.

Gradually, this palm completely completed the golden embodiment of the other side, and every blow was extremely terrifying.

"The golden embodiment on the other side of the palm of one hand can even be used for defense. Now, I'm enough to be afraid of many eight bone transformations!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Subsequently.

He tried to create the magic of the other side, but he had no clue and had no choice but to give up.

"If you can see a genius from the other side, then maybe you can have some understanding!"

Ye Tian muttered.

At this time, he remembered that the Lord of Eternal Zero had said that there was a genius on the other side of Gu Heng Mountain, but he didn't know who it was.

Thereupon.

He inquired about it, and finally learned the name of this other-level genius from the mouth of a certain envoy.

"Lord of the Ancient Void!"

This Lord of the Ancient Void, who is also a lord of the Ancient Heng Mountain, is now an eight-time bone transformation realm cultivator, and it is said that he is the son of the mountain lord, so he is so demonic.

"It's no wonder that he has become a genius on the other side, with the cultivation of the mountain master of Gu Heng Mountain, it is not surprising that he has become a genius on the other side!"

Of course.

The Lord of the Ancient Void must be extremely demonic in itself, otherwise no matter how the Mountain Lord cultivates, he will not be able to cultivate it into a genius of the other side!

He wanted to visit and ask the Lord of the Ancient Void, but this Lord had already left the Ancient Heng Mountain to experience a long time ago, so no one knew where he was, unless the Mountain Lord told him.

Therefore, he had no choice but to give up this idea.

"I can't find the Lord of the Ancient Void, I don't know if I can find other other geniuses on the other side?"

Subsequently.

He kept inquiring, and finally learned the name of the second genius of the other side.

This other shore-level genius came from the Ancient Demon Sea, called the Lord of the True Extreme, and was a seventh-time bone transformation realm.

And.

This other shore-level genius is now in the Ancient Demon Sea.

However, it was also difficult for him to get in touch with the Lord of the True Extremes now.

Besides, even if he dived into the Ancient Demon Sea, he didn't want the Lord of the True Extreme to use the magic of the other side!

He was lucky, though.

Some time later, a piece of news came.

A top-notch seventh-time bone transformation realm primeval-level genius who wants to challenge the Lord of the True Extreme.

This news made many Bone Transformation Realm stunned, because it was the same Bone Transformation Realm of the seventh time, how could an ancient-level genius be able to beat a genius on the other side?

But this primordial-level genius came from a top power in a distant region, and no one knew what his strength was.

As a result, many bone metamorphoses are ready to go and see the excitement.

Ye Tian was also ready to go over to see the strength of the other side-level genius, as well as to witness the power of the supernatural power on the other side.
